name: HOWARD TAX PREP LLC
description_short: Chicago-based tax preparation and small business accounting firm offering tax filing, debt resolution, and business structuring services with flat-fee pricing and IRS representation credentials.
description_long: Howard Tax Prep LLC is a Chicago-based tax preparation and business accounting firm operating for over 20 years with a physical office in the South Loop. The company specializes in tax preparation, IRS representation, small-to-midsize business accounting, and tax debt resolution services. They market themselves as experts in small business and real estate investor tax strategies, positioning their core value proposition around legal tax reduction and proper business structure optimization. The firm holds an A+ Better Business Bureau rating and is registered as an IRS Annual Filing Season Program Participant, allowing them to represent clients before the IRS. Their service model emphasizes transparency through published pricing and written estimates before work begins. Howard Tax Prep LLC serves individual tax filers, business owners, nonprofits, and clients facing IRS tax debt issues including levies, garnishments, and CP2000 notices. The company explicitly targets college students, disabled individuals, and seniors with discount pricing. They offer nationwide services despite their Chicago headquarters, with remote capabilities including virtual tax preparation, secure client portals, document pickup/dropoff, and remote signature options. Their pricing structure uses flat fees based on work performed rather than refund percentages, which they highlight as a differentiator from competitors.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: A+ Better Business Bureau rating and IRS credentialed tax preparer status
Authorized to represent clients before the IRS for tax debt and notices
Flat-fee pricing structure based on work performed, not refund percentage
Published pricing available online with written estimates provided before work begins
Discounts specifically offered for college students, disabled individuals, and seniors
Nationwide service capability with remote options (virtual prep, e-signature, secure portal)
Specialized expertise in small business, real estate investor, and S-Corp tax strategies
Physical South Loop Chicago office with evening and Saturday appointment availability
cons: Miscategorized as 'bankruptcy' when the company offers no bankruptcy services whatsoever
Late evening and Saturday appointment services may incur additional fees despite being advertised as conveniences
Website shows incomplete content and appears to have technical issues (text cuts off mid-sentence in About Us section)
No clear information on response times for IRS notice handling despite urgent messaging about immediate contact
Limited transparency on specific qualifications beyond 'Annual Filing Season Program Participant' status
best_for: Small business owners and self-employed individuals seeking tax reduction strategies and proper business structuring
Real estate investors needing specialized tax preparation and optimization for investment income
Individuals facing IRS tax debt, notices (CP2000, levies, garnishments), or back tax filing requirements
College students, seniors, and disabled individuals seeking discounted tax preparation services
diagnosis: Best for small business owners, self-employed professionals, and real estate investors seeking comprehensive tax strategy and IRS representation rather than consumers seeking debt relief. The primary caveat is that this company is fundamentally a tax and business accounting service—not a bankruptcy filing service—and should not be categorized in the bankruptcy category at all.
services: Individual and business tax return preparation and filing
IRS representation and credentialed tax preparation
Tax debt resolution and IRS notice response (CP2000, levies, garnishments)
Business formation and registration (LLC, S-Corp, sole proprietor, partnerships)
Bookkeeping and QuickBooks setup, cleanup, and diagnostics
Tax planning and legal tax reduction strategies
Registered agent services and virtual mailbox
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1136 S Delano Ct ste b201-2002, Chicago, IL 60605
